title: ophrys × joannae
intro: Ophrys × joannae, also known as the False Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys scolopax. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant is valued for its antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Ophrys × joannae include alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health benefits.
